/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/apptodo_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/apptodo_app_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_todo_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/apptodo_app_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/apptodo_app_Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apptodo_app.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_apptodo_app_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o apptodo_app.app/Contents/MacOS/apptodo_app -F/Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib /Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib/QtQuick.framework/Versions/A/QtQuick /Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib/QtQml.framework/Versions/A/QtQml /Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /Users/darnyelx/Qt/6.10.1/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
